AGENTS.md.purpose: verify repository agent instructions remain audit-visible

README.md.purpose: verify badge, generated report links, and repo guidance stay aligned

CHANGELOG.md.purpose: verify release change log and audit evidence stay aligned

.env.example.purpose: verify example environment values contain no secrets or private defaults

.gitignore.purpose: verify ignored runtime state remains outside committed surfaces

Justfile.purpose: verify Just targets stay aligned with local CI entrypoints

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify pinned Rust toolchain and components match local CI

agent/.purpose: verify Jankurai ownership, generated-zone, badge, and proof metadata

.jankurai/.purpose: verify Jankurai score history remains routed through audit governance

assets/.purpose: verify repository assets remain routed through audit metadata

docs/.purpose: verify documentation remains routed through governance and release lanes

docs/release.md.purpose: verify release readiness documentation and artifact expectations

contracts/.purpose: verify contract surfaces and generated-zone policy stay visible

contracts/json-schema/event.schema.json.purpose: verify generated event schema has no drift

contracts/fixtures/events/.purpose: verify generated event fixtures have no drift

db/.purpose: verify data-boundary docs, migration lanes, and constraint lanes stay governance-only until SQL exists

config/.purpose: verify example configuration contains no local secrets or private defaults

prompts/examples/.purpose: verify committed prompt examples contain no private task bodies or local paths

crates/.purpose: verify Rust workspace formatting, linting, tests, and security scans

crates/jailgun-deploy/.purpose: verify deploy behavior and duplicate-code evidence

apps/.command: bash ops/ci/node.sh && bash ops/ci/ux-qa.sh && bash ops/ci/security.sh
apps/.purpose: verify TypeScript, React, browser adapter, frontend build, rendered UX, and security surfaces

apps/dashboard/.purpose: verify dashboard type checks, tests, build, and rendered UX artifacts

.github/.command: bash ops/ci/security.sh && bash ops/ci/release.sh && bash ops/ci/jankurai.sh
.github/.purpose: verify CI changes preserve security, release, and Jankurai audit evidence

ops/.purpose: verify local CI lanes stay aligned with GitHub Actions

scripts/.purpose: verify local CI entrypoints and generators remain runnable

tools/.purpose: verify canonical tool wrappers delegate to governed CI lanes

test-fixtures/.purpose: verify deterministic fixture config and fake deploy e2e tests

tsconfig.base.json.purpose: verify TypeScript project settings compile all workspaces

Cargo.toml.purpose: verify Rust dependency changes compile and pass security scans

Cargo.lock.purpose: verify locked Rust dependencies compile and pass security scans

package.json.purpose: verify Node dependency changes typecheck, test, build, and audit

package-lock.json.purpose: verify locked Node dependencies typecheck, test, build, and audit
